Short CV

I was born in Yalova.   I graduated from Yalova Anatolian Teacher-High School in 2017 and I graduated with a first from Üsküdar University Forensic Science Bachelor in 2021.  I am still a master's student at the Institute of Addiction and Forensic Sciences. Although I am interested in Forensic genetics, Crime Scene İnvestigation, Document examination, Balistic, Fingerprint examination, Criminology, Forensic Psychology, I continue to work in Forensic Chemistry and Forensic Toxicology  that I prepared my final project about ‘Effect of COVID-19 Pandemic on Using of Heroin

I am to work as a Research Assistant in the Department of Forensic Science Of Üsküdar University since 2022.
